summary: Iteration 26 — Career Deep Search location mix + Tailor Resume validation. Backend pytest: 4/5 asserted PASS. Deep-search (Financial Management + Atlanta, GA + on_site_hybrid + 30d) returned 66 jobs with mixed location_type (on_site + remote + unknown); GET /api/jobs/verified-feed?limit=40 confirmed the mix is NOT 100% remote (regression fix holds). Second deep-search (Software Engineer + Washington DC + hybrid + 7d) returned 200 with jobs_count>0. tailor/generate with a deep-search job_id (Budget Analyst @ Hillsborough County Sheriff’s Office, ~192s Claude call via localhost:8001) returned 200 with version_id (ver_*), ats_score_after=int, non-empty job_title/employer, and source_job_id matching the request. Regression tailor from jd_id could NOT be executed because the shared Emergent LLM budget was exhausted mid-run (Max budget $6, current cost $6.15) — this is NOT a code bug; both code paths share _do_tailor and the deep-search path already proved the Claude pipeline works. Frontend Playwright (390x844): login → /career/jobs → Run Deep Search Now → 60 job cards rendered → mix analysed (9 remote-only vs 51 non-remote with cards showing Marietta GA On-site, Washington DC, Alexandria VA, Robins AFB GA On-site, etc.) → tapped tailor-664bd41adb1116f0058b (Budget Analyst @ Cobb County Government) → tailor-modal loaded with URL /career/tailor-modal?job_id=... → verified-job-card shows 'VERIFIED · GovernmentJobs.com' badge, title 'Budget Analyst', employer 'Cobb County Government', location '📍 Marietta, GA' → no error alerts.

minor.issue: Long-running Claude call (60-90s+) sometimes exceeds the preview ingress 60s idle timeout, yielding an HTML 502 Bad Gateway page to any external client. Internal invocation via localhost:8001 works. If real users experience this on the deployed preview, consider chunking the response (SSE / streaming) or moving to an async job pattern.

During this iteration the shared LLM budget was exhausted (Max $6, current $6.15). Regression jd_id-tailor could not be validated because Claude refused further calls. Both code paths share _do_tailor so the fix is functionally proven by the job_id run.

react_native_issues.issue: Web console warns: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — non-blocking. Reference: multiple files under /app/frontend/app/*.

action_items: Ensure Emergent LLM budget is refreshed before re-running the jd_id regression tailor test — expected to pass since it shares _do_tailor with the job_id path.
Consider adding a streaming / async-job pattern to /api/career/library/tailor/generate so the ~60-90s Claude call doesn't get killed by the preview ingress 60s idle timeout in production.
Optional: replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with boxShadow across the app (RN 0.76+ compat).
critical_code_review_comments: career_library.py is 1142 lines — beyond the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into resumes/jds/tailor/history submodules.

In tailor_generate() the live JD re-fetch swallows all exceptions with a bare `except Exception: pass` (line 720). At minimum log the exception so we can diagnose future JD-fetch failures without silent data drift.

success_rate.backend: 80% (4/5 executed; 5th blocked by LLM budget, not code)

seed_data_creation: No permanent seeds. Two deep-search runs populated the jobs_feed for test1@plos.app and one resume version (ver_*) was persisted for the Budget Analyst @ Hillsborough County job (test_04). The manual JD test was skipped due to LLM budget so no TEST_ jd_id was created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL has an ~60s ingress idle timeout — always run tailor/generate assertions against http://localhost:8001 for reliability (see BACKEND_URL env in test_iteration_26_career.py). The deep-search endpoint accepts freshness values '7d'/'30d'/'today'/'any' and work_type_filter values including 'on_site_hybrid' and 'hybrid'. The /career/jobs page uses testIDs tailor-<job_id> and run-deep-search (see /app/frontend/app/career/jobs.tsx). The Career bottom-tab testID 'tab-career' from expo-router does NOT reliably surface on web preview; navigate via router URL http://localhost:3000/career/jobs directly.
rca_of_issue: The two Iteration 26 fixes verified: (1) jobs_deep_search location sanitization drops literal 'Remote' from the locations list and rewrites suburb strings (bethesda→Washington DC, marietta→Atlanta GA) before hitting Google Jobs/SerpApi, so results are no longer all-remote — verified feed now shows Marietta GA On-site, Washington DC, Alexandria VA, Robins AFB GA On-site, etc. (2) career_library.tailor_generate now reads either legacy (job_title, description) OR new deep-search (title, description_full) fields with an additional live re-fetch via jobs_jd_fetch.fetch_job_description when description length < 40, so tailor from a deep-search job_id no longer 400s. Frontend tailor-modal.tsx displays the correct title+employer+location from the deep-search job in the verified-job-card.
